svg.text: single prompt → shipped product, fully self-contained • 10 role types
"build me an app to play blackjack"
user-facing • mostly idle once build starts • only sees Severity 5 escalations
long-running • owns DAG • dispatches overseer waves
flow control only — no decision authority
stitches sections together • owns the seams • cross-section glue code
authority limited to connecting work, not creating new section work
checks finished system against Discovery's product spec
acceptance gate · different from Critic (process) — this is outcome
gray dashed: data read / monitoring / status update
red dotted: escalation (overseer → Arbiter, Arbiter → upstream)
Notes on what's not drawn explicitly
• All agents read/write to a shared state files directory in the workspace (the data plane).
• The Status Artifact is a render layer over those files — it never holds canonical state.
• Critic runs on a schedule (e.g. every few minutes); other arrows from Critic abbreviated for clarity.
• Arbiter routes to: section overseer (sev 1), interface contract (sev 2), Technical Discovery (sev 3),
• "Section · Edge Case Testing" activates in multiple waves alongside other sections, not strictly parallel.
